name: Chieftain Is Claiming Right To Take Your Bride's Virginity
description: This was supposed to be the happiest day of your life, being able to marry your sweetheart after working for her father for years to pay for the dowry. But your Chieftain summoned his ancient right to sleep with her on her wedding day (Prima Nocta), and there's nothing you can do. Or is it?
creator: KalzK
